concerns.text: FR-007 anchors to 'See Assumptions' instead of a User Story. While the Assumptions section mentions the sensitivity analysis, the requirement itself must explicitly anchor to a User Story (e.g., US-3) to satisfy the coverage rule that every FR must trace to a story. 'Assumptions' is not a User Story.

FR-008 anchors to 'See Assumptions' instead of a User Story. The power analysis is part of the statistical validation required to answer the research question (US-3). It must explicitly anchor to US-3 (e.g., 'See US-3') to avoid being flagged as an orphaned requirement.

SC-005 anchors to 'See Assumptions' instead of a User Story. The 6-hour runtime constraint is a success criterion for the entire pipeline (US-1, US-2, US-3). It must explicitly anchor to the relevant User Story (e.g., 'See US-2' or 'See US-3') to ensure traceability.

SC-006 anchors to 'See FR-007'. Success Criteria must anchor to a User Story, not another requirement. Since FR-007 itself lacks a direct story anchor, SC-006 is doubly orphaned. It must be re-anchored to US-3 (e.g., 'See US-3').
